publisher: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics
title: ICRISAT Annual Report 2004 'Sowing Seeds of Success'
abstract:
It is a novelty and a pleasure to be writing a joint message for ICRISAT’s Annual Report this year, reflecting in no small measure the strong and extremely productive bond between Team ICRISAT and its Governing Board – entities that complement each other so well, that it is difficult to find a definite dividing line.
The time between the last Annual Report and this one has been profusely encouraging. The Institute has leap-frogged into prominence due to its unique achievements, and has bravely and proudly declared a turnaround for the better.
You will have seen the following in other documents, but the Governing Board and management recently strengthened it, and it is worth mentioning ICRISAT’s noble guideposts – our vision, mission and mandate.
keywords: Annual Report, ICRISAT Annual Report, ICRISAT
institution: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics
